parts.prompt:
Task: redesign snake_tail_base.png for a snake skin.
Hard lock: keep shape and silhouette exactly the same as template classic-burrow (snake_tail_base.png).
Only replace color/material/texture. Do not change contour or proportions.
Style consistency lock: must match the color family, lighting direction, gloss level, and texture density of other parts in this same skin set.
Use style reference image as primary material source.
Body/tail part: no face elements.
Background must be pure solid color: #00ff00.
Global design note (highest priority): none.
Main style prompt: 1. Update the classic-burrow prototype with the colors and textures from the style reference image. The overall aesthetic should be casual game, cartoon Q-version, cute, and exquisite.
2. Retain the classic-burrow's expression. Minor detail adjustments for beautification are allowed, but no major changes.
3. Avoid snakeskin textures. Instead, use the texture from the style reference image..
Extra user note: none.
